pr.title: Non-record submission: mean-delta warm start + depth recurrence for SLOT (0.8503 BPB)

output.summary: Mean-delta SLOT warm start plus learned depth recurrence reuse previous batch corrections and double-pass layers to sharpen per-batch refinement without extra params.
techniques: SLOT mean-delta warm start using decayed previous-batch deltas
Depth recurrence with iter_embed/iter_gate to double-pass layers without adding parameters
